content: AnthropicClient accepts optional _client parameter for dependency injection in tests. Avoids prototype-level spying on Anthropic.messages which does not exist on the prototype (instance property). Pattern: inject dependencies for testability without modifying the public API.

name: cc-client-testability
description: CC subprocess backend exports pure functions (serializeMessages, buildPrompt, parseCcOutput) for direct unit testing without spawning processes. Integration tests use a StubCcClient subclass that overrides call() to return controlled output.

name: anthropic-sdk-0.39-breaking-types
description: SDK 0.39.0: TextBlock.citations required (use null), Usage.cache_* fields required number|null (not optional). Check CHANGELOG on upgrades.

name: integration-canonical-types
description: Canonical src/types.ts defines all shared types (Tool, ToolRegistry, ContextManager, BudgetUtilization, etc.); sub-module types.ts files re-export from ../types.ts rather than defining locally. Prevents type mismatches across parallel-built modules.

content: ToolRegistry class uses toDefinitions() not definitions(). The ToolRegistry interface in src/types.ts defines register/get/list/toDefinitions. Test files and loop.ts must call toDefinitions().

name: parallel-mvp-build
description: Sapling MVP built via 5 parallel leads in ~55 min: scaffold, tools (50 tests), client (20 tests), context manager (67 tests), agent loop (13 tests). Integration lead reconciled cross-module types. 164 total tests, ~2300 lines source.
ov merge fails when working tree has unstaged changes to files modified by the merge branch
resolution: Commit or stash unstaged changes before running ov merge. Check git status for clean working tree.

description: CcClient pipe deadlock: awaiting proc.exited before draining stdout/stderr causes permanent hang when claude subprocess fills the OS pipe buffer (~64KB).
resolution: Use Promise.all([proc.exited, stdout.text(), stderr.text()]) to drain concurrently. Also set stdin:'ignore' to prevent claude waiting for input.

name: claude-cli-subprocess-flags
description: Claude Code CLI flags for subprocess invocation: use '--system-prompt <content>' (NOT --system-prompt-file), '--json-schema <json-string>' (inline JSON, NOT a file path), '--tools ""' disables all tools, '--output-format json' returns {type,result,usage} envelope. Strip CLAUDECODE env var from subprocess env to avoid nested sessions error.
CcClient --max-turns 1 with --json-schema causes error_max_turns (num_turns:2) because JSON schema validation/retry counts as an extra turn internally.
resolution: Remove --max-turns when using --tools '' since disabled tools already prevent agentic loops. The model responds once and exits.

name: cc-plain-text-fallback
description: When --json-schema is combined with --tools '', claude ignores the schema and returns plain text in the result field. CcClient must handle this gracefully: if JSON.parse(result) fails, treat result as text_response with no tool_calls. This makes the loop terminate naturally (no tool calls = task complete).

content: The agent loop (src/loop.ts) must print the final text response to stdout when the task completes. Extract text blocks from the last assistant response and write them with process.stdout.write(). Without this, the model's answer is silently swallowed.

name: reshape-consecutive-user-fix
description: reshapeMessages inserts a synthetic assistant [Acknowledged] message between task(user) and archive(user) to prevent consecutive user messages that violate the Anthropic API alternating-role requirement. isArchiveMessage() also filters this ack so it does not accumulate in history across turns.
